```{r, echo=FALSE}
                tags$th(style="text-align:left;font-size:11px;color:#7f8c8d;padding:6px 12px;", "Área Temática"),
                lapply(FATORES, function(f)
                  tags$th(style=paste0("text-align:center;color:",f$cor,";font-size:12px;"), f$label)),
                tags$th(style="text-align:right;font-size:11px;color:#7f8c8d;padding:6px 8px;", "Total")
              )
            ),
            tags$tbody(
              lapply(TEMAS, function(t) {
                row_vals <- sapply(FATORES, function(f) PESTEL_COV[[t$id]][[f$key]][fi+1])
                row_total <- sum(row_vals)
                row_col <- if(row_total >= 5) "#004aad" else if(row_total >= 3) "#27ae60" else if(row_total >= 1) "#5de0e6" else "#95a5a6"
                tags$tr(
                  tags$td(class="hm-label", t$nome),
                  lapply(seq_along(FATORES), function(fi2) {
                    val <- row_vals[fi2]
                    f   <- FATORES[[fi2]]
                    bg  <- if(val == 1) f$cor else "#f0f4f8"
                    txt <- if(val == 1) "white" else "#c0c0c0"
                    tags$td(
                      class="hm-cell",
                      style=paste0("background:", bg, ";color:", txt, ";font-size:14px;font-weight:800;width:38px;"),
                      onclick=sprintf("Shiny.setInputValue('questao_clicada','%s|Q01',{priority:'event'})", t$id),
                      if(val==1) "✓" else "·"
                    )
                  }),
                  tags$td(style="text-align:right;padding:4px 10px;",
                    tags$span(style=paste0("font-weight:800;color:",row_col,";font-size:13px;"), row_total)
                  )
                )
              })
            ),
            tags$tfoot(
              tags$tr(
                tags$td(style="padding:6px 12px;font-size:11px;color:#7f8c8d;font-weight:700;"),
                lapply(FATORES, function(f) {
                  cnt <- sum(sapply(PESTEL_COV, function(t) t[[f$key]][fi+1]))
                  tags$td(style="text-align:center;padding:4px 2px;",
                    tags$span(style=paste0("font-weight:800;color:",f$cor,";font-size:13px;"), cnt))
                }),
                tags$td()
              )
            )
          )
        )
      )
    )

  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  # EQUIPE
  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  } else if (pg == "equipe") {
    equipe <- list(
      list(nome="Prof. Dr. Cláudio Jorge Pinto Alves",
           foto="imagens/claudio_jorge.png",
           linkedin="https://www.linkedin.com/in/claudio-jorge-pinto-alves-78149010/"),
      list(nome="Prof. Dr. Marcelo Xavier Guterres",
           foto="imagens/marcelo_guterres.png",
           linkedin="https://www.linkedin.com/in/profguterres/"),
      list(nome="Prof. Dr. Flávio Mendes Neto",
           foto="imagens/flavio_mendes.png",
           linkedin="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ffllaavviioo/"),
      list(nome="Profa. Dra. Mayara Condé Rocha Murça",
           foto="imagens/mayara_conde.png",
           linkedin="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mayara-condé-rocha-murça-a4a8482ba/"),
      list(nome="Prof. Dr. Daniel Alberto Pamplona",
           foto="imagens/daniel_pamplona.png",
           linkedin="https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-pamplona-024389140/"),
      list(nome="MSc. Marcelo Saraiva Peres",
           foto="imagens/marcelo_saraiva.png",
           linkedin="https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcelo-saraiva-peres-563a8b104/"),
      list(nome="Gabriel Luiz Goulart Rufino",
           foto="imagens/gabriel_goulart.png",
           linkedin="https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabriel-luiz-11294919b/"),
      list(nome="Rodrigo Mollo Furlan",
           foto="imagens/rodrigo_mollo.png",
           linkedin="https://www.linkedin.com/in/rodrigo-furlan-67b264209/")
    )

    tagList(
      tags$div(class="main-c",
        tags$div(style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:32px;",
          h2("Equipe Sigma City", style="color:#004aad;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:8px;"),
          p("Especialistas responsáveis pelo desenvolvimento do Produto II",
            style="color:#7f8c8d;font-size:15px;")
        ),
        tags$div(class="equipe-grid",
          lapply(equipe, function(m) {
            tags$div(class="membro-card",
              tags$a(href=m$linkedin, target="_blank", class="membro-foto",
                style="display:block;position:relative;",
                tags$img(src=m$foto, alt=m$nome,
                  onerror="this.style.display='none';this.parentElement.style.background='#e0e0e0';")),
              tags$div(class="membro-nome", m$nome),
              tags$a(href=m$linkedin, target="_blank", class="linkedin-icon",
                title=paste0("LinkedIn — ", m$nome), HTML("in"))
            )
          })
        ),
        tags$div(class="page-footer",
          tags$p(tags$a("Instituto Tecnológico de Aeronáutica (ITA)", href="http://www.ita.br/", target="_blank"),
            " | ", tags$a("Projeto Sigma City", href="https://sigma.ita.br", target="_blank"))
        )
      )
    )

  } else {
    tags$div(class="main-c", h3("Página não encontrada"))
  }
})
```
